compose_diagnostics.compose_text_preview: @gmanews reports NBI has intel on incoming ICC arrest warrants. This signals potential movement on accountability for extrajudicial killings, a core demand for justice. The pursuit of legal process, even internationally, is crucial when domestic mechanisms falter.
